raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un to Granatu-Ahbotu
btja dewixdefinitis feschi weenâ
Puffê/ wiffo Granatu-Ahbotu
btja fiints pahr to Tihkla Dar-
bu apkaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas Pils-Karra-Wihru
Wirfneeks nehme Seraju to
augstaku Preesteri/ un Zewantiju
to ohtru Preesteri/ un tohs trihs
Sleektaa Sargus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no ta Pilsfahta jeh-
me wiꞥsch weenu Kambar-Jun-
kuri/ kas pahr teem Karra-Wih-
reem bija eezelts/ un feptinus
Wihrus no teem/ kas ap to Keh-
nizu bija/ kas Pilsfahta atrasti
tappe/ ir ta Karra-Spehka Nak-
sittajn/ kas tohs Semmes Lau-
dis Karra uhsrakstija/ un fech-
definitis Wihrus/ no teem Lau-
dim tahs Semmes/ kas Pils-
fahta Widdit tappe atrasti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tohs nehine Nebusar-
Adans tas Pils-Karra-Wihru
Wirfneeks/ un wedde tohs pee ta
Kehniza no Babeles uhs Rib-
latu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch no Ba-
beles kawe tohs/ un nokawe tohs
reksch Riblatas Cemata Sem-
nê. Ta tappe Juhda no fa-
vas Semmes aiswests.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schee irr tee Laudis/ ko
NebukadRezars irr aisweddis
feptitâ Gaddâ/ trihs tuhksto-
chus dwidefinits un trihs Ju-
us.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Astotâ padeſmitâ Gad-
dâ NebukadRezara/ astonſintis
trihsdefinitis un diwi Dwehfeles
no Jerusalenee.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Diwideſmitâ treschâ Gad-
dâ NebukadRezara/ nowedde
NebusarAdans tas Pils-Karra-
Wihru Wirfneeks feptinsints/
tschetrdefmits un peezaâ Dweh-
feles no teem Judeem. Wiﬀas
Dwehfeles irr tschetr tuhkfotschas
un feschſints.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet treschâ Definitâ feptiâ Gaddâ tahs Aisweſchanas
Jojakima ta Kehnixa no Juh-
da/ divipadeſmitâ Mehnefi/ di-
wideſmitâ peektâ Deenâ tahs
Mehnes/ pa-augstinaja Ewilme-
rodaks tas Kehninsch no Babe-
les/ pirnâ Gaddâ fatwas Wal-
dischanas/ to Galivu Jojakima
ta Kehnixa no Juhda/un iswed-
de to no Zeetuma Namina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch runnaja laip-
nigi ar winnu/ un zehle wiꞥsch
Krehſlu pahr to Kehnizu Krehs-
leim/ kas pee winna eeksch Ba-
beles btja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch pahrmihje tahs
Drehbes winna Zeetuma/ un eh-
de weenumehr to Maisi winna
Preektcha/ wiﬀas tawas Dsh-
wbas Deenas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winnam tappe weenu-
mehr Barriba no ta Kehnixa no
Babeles dohta/ ikdeenags tawa
nospreesta Teeta/ lihds winna
Mischanas Deenai/wiffâ
winna Muhscha.
Ta Praweeta Jeremijus Gals.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
